details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Invoice bundle request
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.miles
  - entity.nina
related_projects:
  - northstar_ledger
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to your design partner:

- INV-0001 — issued 2025-11-03 — EUR 610
- INV-0002 — issued 2025-12-01 — EUR 770

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft was written successfully. Verification: attachment paths are exact files I read; ordering is newest-first (2025-12-01 then 2025-11-03); recipient matches Miles's canonical primary_contact_email. No rewrite allowed. Next delete the processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with the two verified invoice attachments.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: verified sender Miles, resolved design partner canonically through Nina and Northstar Ledger, read the two oldest linked invoices, wrote reply draft, and deleted processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested inbox work.

function.message: Worked the oldest inbox message by verifying the sender as Miles Novak, resolving the design partner link through Nina Schreiber and the Northstar Ledger project, and drafting a reply email to miles@novak.example with the two oldest linked invoices attached. The processed inbox item was then deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements (tree, AGENTS.md, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering folders, used the process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via cast primary_contact_email, used canonical project/entity evidence before acting in finance, wrote one durable outbox email record using sending-email.md, kept attachments newest-first, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email at 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md came from miles@novak.example, which matches the canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. The only canonical partner candidate was Nina Schreiber in 10_entities/cast/nina.md, and 40_projects/2026_04_01_northstar_ledger/README.MD canonically links entity.nina to the Northstar Ledger project. The two oldest Northstar invoices read during this run, 2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md and 2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md, both explicitly list related_entity Nina Schreiber, so they satisfy the request. A reply draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md and the processed inbox file was deleted.
